Stub function for checking if airplane mode is on, always returning false.

# Purpose
This code is a C++ header file that provides a narrow functionality related to checking the status of airplane mode. It includes a function [`bt_ctl_is_airplane_mode_on`](<#bt_ctl_is_airplane_mode_on>) that returns a boolean value, which is always `false`. The function is marked with the `WEAK` attribute, indicating that it can be overridden by other definitions with the same name in different translation units. The inclusion of `"util/attributes.h"` suggests that the `WEAK` attribute is defined in that header file. This code is intended to be imported and used in other parts of a program where the status of airplane mode needs to be checked or overridden.

- `util/attributes.h`
